revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 5일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月初五]][[zh:六月初五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 5일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月初五]][[zh:六月初五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 5일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月初五]][[zh:六月初五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 5일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月初五]][[zh:六月初五]]
{{Not to be confused with|June 5|qq=June 5}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=六月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 6월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar June|qq=}} '''June 5''' is the 5th day of the month {{ill|June (Lunisolar)|ja|6月 (旧暦)|lt=June (Minazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 6th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Chōgen|en|Chōgen|qid=Q1193557|lt=Chōgen|1=Chōgen}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1028|en|1028|qid=Q19273|lt=1028|1=1028}} {{ill|June 29|en|June 29|qid=Q2659|lt=June 29|1=June 29}}) – In the {{ill|Taira no Tadatsune Rebellion|ja|平忠常の乱|1=Taira no Tadatsune Rebellion|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11482777}}, the rebel {{ill|Taira no Tadatsune|en|Taira no Tadatsune|qid=Q1105844|lt=Hirata Tadachika|1=Taira no Tadatsune}} attacked the provincial government in [[Awa Province]] and killed Governor Minamoto no Mototada. * {{ill|Eiman|en|Eiman|qid=Q1193868|lt=Eiman|1=Eiman}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1165|en|1165|qid=Q19676|lt=1165|1=1165}} {{ill|July 14|en|July 14|qid=Q2691|lt=July 14|1=July 14}}) – Due to the illness of Emperor Nijō, the era name was changed from {{ill|Chōkan|en|Chōkan|qid=Q1193904|lt=Chōkan|1=Chōkan}} to {{ill|Eiman|en|Eiman|qid=Q1193868|lt=Eiman|1=Eiman}}. * [[Hōchi]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1247|en|1247|qid=Q5482|lt=1247|1=1247}} {{ill|July 8|en|July 8|qid=Q2692|lt=July 8|1=July 8}}) – During the {{Interlanguage link|Battle of Hōji|ja|宝治合戦}}, the Kamakura shogunate’s Shikken, {{ill|Hōjō Tokiyori|en|Hōjō Tokiyori|qid=Q1354410|lt=Hōjo Tokiyori|1=Hōjō Tokiyori}}, defeated and executed the critic {{ill|Miura Taimura|ja|三浦泰村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miura Taimura|1=Miura Yasumura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11356483}}, leading to the downfall of the Miura clan. * {{ill|Shōryaku|en|Shōryaku|qid=Q1324858|lt=Shōkyō|1=Shōryaku}} 2nd year / {{ill|Genkō (1331–1334)|en|Genkō (1331–1334)|qid=Q1194556|lt=Genkō|1=Genkō (1331–1334)}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1333|en|1333|qid=Q6004|lt=1333|1=1333}} {{ill|July 17|en|July 17|qid=Q2729|lt=July 17|1=July 17}}) – As part of an anti-bakufu coup, Emperor Go-Daigo was exiled to {{ill|Oki Province|en|Oki Province|qid=Q1063829|lt=隠岐|1=Oki Province}} but later escaped back to Kyoto. * {{ill|Jōkyō|en|Jōkyō|qid=Q1146221|lt=Jōkyō|1=Jōkyō}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1684|en|1684|qid=Q7654|lt=1684|1=1684}} {{ill|July 17|en|July 17|qid=Q2729|lt=July 17|1=July 17}}) – The Edo period writer [[Banzuiin Chōbē]] set an impressive record by composing 23,500 verses in one day. * {{ill|Genji era|en|Genji era|qid=Q1325419|lt=Genji|1=Genji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1864|en|1864|qid=Q7704|lt=1864|1=1864}} {{ill|July 8|en|July 8|qid=Q2692|lt=July 8|1=July 8}}) – In the [[Ikedaya Incident]], the Shinsengumi attacked pro-imperial loyalists gathered at a Kyoto inn. == Births == * {{ill|Genki (era)|en|Genki (era)|qid=Q1145064|lt=Genki|1=Genki (era)}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1571|en|1571|qid=Q6666|lt=1571|1=1571}} {{ill|June 27|en|June 27|qid=Q2664|lt=June 27|1=June 27}}) – {{ill|Kadoya Soan|ja|角倉素庵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadoya Soan|1=Suminokura Soan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11630678}}, a civil engineer, calligrapher, and trader (died {{ill|1632|en|1632|qid=Q6865|lt=1632|1=1632}}). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1572|en|1572|qid=Q6670|lt=1572|1=1572}} {{ill|July 14|en|July 14|qid=Q2691|lt=July 14|1=July 14}}) – {{ill|Sakai Tadayo|en|Sakai Tadayo|qid=Q1065113|lt=Sakai Tadayori|1=Sakai Tadayo}}, a Tairō and the 2nd lord of Ueno Domain (died {{ill|1636|en|1636|qid=Q6885|lt=1636|1=1636}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Kempo (era)|en|Kempo (era)|qid=Q1194251|lt=Kempo|1=Kempo (era)}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1215|en|1215|qid=Q5366|lt=1215|1=1215}} {{ill|July 3|en|July 3|qid=Q2699|lt=July 3|1=July 3}}) – {{ill|Eisai|en|Eisai|qid=Q366128|lt=Meian Eisei|1=Eisai}}, the founder of the Rinzai school of Zen Buddhism in Japan (born {{ill|1141|en|1141|qid=Q19613|lt=1141|1=1141}}). * [[Hōchi]] 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1247|en|1247|qid=Q5482|lt=1247|1=1247}} {{ill|July 8|en|July 8|qid=Q2692|lt=July 8|1=July 8}}) – {{ill|Miura Taimura|ja|三浦泰村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miura Taimura|1=Miura Yasumura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11356483}}, a military commander, leader of the Miura clan (born {{ill|1184|en|1184|qid=Q19728|lt=1184|1=1184}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|6|4|6|6|5|5|7|6|0605|qq=}}
== References == {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 6월 5일]] [[ja:6月5日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:六月初五]]
